payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial edge crop of a dark brown wooden dining chair back showing multiple narrow vertical carved slats and a gently curved top rail; visible wood grain and a slight glossy varnish indicate finished hardwood and the visible portion appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.
